第三方平台 API Agent 实现（通用接口）: Third-Party Platform API Agent Implementation (General Interface)
最大生成 token 数: Maximum number of tokens to generate
最大重试次数（针对429和503错误）: Maximum number of retries (for 429 and 503 errors)
发送聊天请求（兼容 OpenAI 格式），带429和503错误重试机制: Send a chat request (OpenAI-compatible format) with retry mechanism for 429 and 503 errors
是否流式返回（第三方平台可能不支持）: Whether to return a streaming response (may not be supported by third-party platforms)
处理429和503错误（都是临时性错误，应该重试）: Handle 429 and 503 errors (both are transient errors that should be retried)
添加随机抖动，避免多个请求同时重试: Add random jitter to avoid simultaneous retries
429 和 503 都是临时性错误，应该重试: 429 and 503 are both transient errors that should be retried
其他HTTP错误直接抛出: Other HTTP errors are raised directly
